privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task uses synthetically generated data to populate Snipe-IT with an employee and their assets. The expected target_user "schen", expected asset tags (ASSET-SC01, ASSET-SC02, ASSET-SC03, ASSET-SC04), and their respective post-check-in statuses ("Ready to Deploy" except "Out for Repair" for ASSET-SC02) exactly match the requirements in the task description and verifier scripts.
